author: Michael Makarov
description: Run Claude Code, Codex, Grok, AntiGravity, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode as local AI agents in your vault, with chat, inline editing, and tools. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: sandsaber
releases.description:
## Changes
- Fix Antigravity CLI startup and stdout handling on Windows with transcript/settings fallback recovery.
- Add Antigravity custom model labels and expand the Pro AI fallback model list.
- Document Windows-specific Antigravity CLI limitations in settings and README files.

## Verification
- Antigravity unit suite: 33 passed.
- Typecheck: passed.
- Lint: passed.
- Release build: passed.
- npm audit --omit=dev: 0 vulnerabilities.

Note: the full unit suite currently has unrelated Windows-host path/CSS baseline failures; scoped Antigravity tests and release checks pass.
releases.name: Grimoire 1.0.21
